programmes.show_description: On the box this time: Coronation Street, Love Island, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Starstruck, Cheat, Dancing on Ice, and Catfish UK.
Self-professed 'crazy camel lady' Sandra is after a mature man to ride off into the sunset with. Pansexual erotic writer Toni-Ann dreams of being the heroine in her own sexy novel.
In this feature-length episode, Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding... in Ukraine. But fussy bride-to-be Anna and her hard-to-please mum are banking on a very British bash.
After months of torment, Dodger finally has his chance to expose Sully, but Sully's ready to fight dirty... Vicky bonds with Prince, Sienna makes a tough decision and Donny faces the truth.
After months of torment and pain, Dodger finally has his chance to expose Sully for what he really is, but Sully's ready to fight dirty...
Vicky and Prince form a bond. Donny's family support him as he faces the truth. And buried tensions begin to thaw.
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.
Spanish Pavillion: Gordon Ramsay visits Spanish Pavillion, a family-run restaurant whose owners, brothers Michael and Jerry, spend more time struggling for power than working.
Fiddler: Murray becomes an overzealous stage parent when he learns that Adam has no interest in auditioning for the school production of Fiddler on the Roof.
Bohemian Rap City: Beverly and Murray are worried about Adam's obsession with toys. Erica's band decide to audition for a TV talent show.
Snapped: Claire needs to clear the house before anyone makes her look bad in front of a reporter from an important women's business magazine. Jay invites Manny to a wine tasting.
Perfect Pairs: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love looking after the twins, but find it exhausting. But then they realise that the babies might be useful for their to-do lists...
No Loan Again, Naturally: When Homer and Marge's mortgage rate skyrockets, they have to put their house up for sale - and Flanders buys it and becomes their landlord.
Gone Maggie Gone: When Marge temporarily loses her sight, Homer loses Maggie to a convent and Lisa has to go undercover as a nun to find her.
Father Knows Worst: Marge finds a sauna in the basement but doesn't tell anyone about it. Homer decides to get more involved in the children's education.
Classic American: Best pals Colleen and Naomi bought Classic American in New York together, but their inexperience is pushing their friendship to the edge. Can Gordon help?
Down City: Gordon Ramsay tries to save struggling restaurant Down City in Providence, Rhode Island. But tough-talking owner Abby refuses to take advice from anyone.
Worst Episode Ever: Bart and Milhouse end up running Comic Book Guy's shop after he has a heart attack. And, while he recovers, Comic Book Guy falls in love...
Tennis the Menace: Homer builds a tennis court in the back garden but becomes jealous of Bart's tennis skills and swears revenge at the Krusty Klassic tournament.
Dead on a Rival: Mitchell learns a valuable life lesson when Murray shows up unexpectedly. And the Dunphys' old neighbour Kenneth, who's now a tech titan, visits.
Paris: The family head to Paris so that Jay can accept a lifetime achievement award for his work in the closet industry. But his old nemesis, Earl Chambers, haunts him.
...Reunion Special: Brand new - Revelations and a fiery showdown are served as the class of 2025 reunite at an explosive dinner party.
Celebs including Matt Richardson, Will Best, Linda Robson, Lesley Joseph, Paul Danan, and Célena and Mariama from the Honeyz board Brendan Sheerin's big bus in northern Portugal.
The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer: Homer becomes the boss of Fat Tony's mob when Tony's son decides to become a chef rather than go into the family business.
Jazzy and the Pussycats: Bart takes up playing the drums, upstages Lisa and joins a top jazz band. So Lisa turns her back on music and starts rescuing animals instead.
Dillon leans on Lucas for support, but will sparks re-ignite between the former lovers? Elsewhere, a mum confides in her friends at a yoga class.
...Australia - Brand new series: MAFS Australia is back with a fresh batch of Aussie singles ready to wed sight unseen, starting with a jaw-dropping moment at the altar.
Brand new series - Brandon from College: Twisted mystery romcom with Stephanie Hsu. When Ruby's ex-lovers start dying in unusual ways, she must confront her sex timeline. (Ep1/8)
The top TV includes Jamie's £1 Wonders, Married at First Sight Australia, Only Connect, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Fall and Naked and Afraid.
On the box this time: The Piano, MAFS Australia, MILF Manor, Wild Isles, the News on Gary Lineker's BBC suspension, and the silent Match of the Day that followed!
DJ Terry Turbo returns. Has he changed his Jack-the-lad ways? Are Ben and Gary's dates more keen on each other? Model Rochelle's looking for love that's more than skin-deep.
Brand new series: MAFS Australia is back with a fresh batch of Aussie singles ready to wed sight unseen, starting with a jaw-dropping moment at the altar.
No Loan Again, Naturally: When Homer and Marge's mortgage rate skyrockets, they have to put their house up for sale - and Flanders buys it and becomes their landlord.
Gone Maggie Gone: When Marge temporarily loses her sight, Homer loses Maggie to a convent and Lisa has to go undercover as a nun to find her.
Father Knows Worst: Marge finds a sauna in the basement but doesn't tell anyone about it. Homer decides to get more involved in the children's education.
It's Vegas baby! Groom Simon and best man Anthony sit down and pour over the decisions that led to Simon gambling it all on an explosive Las Vegas wedding to bride Kayleigh. (Ep6)
Vicky and Prince form a bond. Donny's family support him as he faces the truth. And buried tensions begin to thaw.
Dillon leans on Lucas for support, but will sparks re-ignite between the former lovers? Elsewhere, a mum confides in her friends at a yoga class.
A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.
Classic American: Best pals Colleen and Naomi bought Classic American in New York together, but their inexperience is pushing their friendship to the edge. Can Gordon help?
The Living Room: A 100% True Story: Barry's worried about Murray's health, so he asks his friends and Coach Mellor to help him get fit.
Bachelor Party: Barry thinks he wants a wild bachelor party, but when he's confronted with the reality, he realises that Adam's idea of a low-key event is more his speed.
Pool Party: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover that they have their own self-doubts.
The Last Halloween: Phil's determined to scare Claire on Halloween. And for the first time, Gloria is self-conscious about her age when someone correctly assumes she's Jay's wife.
Brand new series: MAFS Australia is back with a fresh batch of Aussie singles ready to wed sight unseen, starting with a jaw-dropping moment at the altar.
Grasshopper Also: In Carlstadt, New Jersey, Gordon Ramsay attempts to save the Grasshopper Also, a family-owned Irish restaurant that's on its last legs.
Day of the Jackanapes: Sideshow Bob swears revenge on Krusty for accidentally erasing the first 10 years of their programme.
Now Museum, Now You Don't: Lisa explores the wonders of western art. She becomes Lisanardo, and Bart turns into a French impressionist.
Baby Steps: Cam and Mitch debate the pros and cons of adopting another baby after receiving an unexpected call from the agency. And Claire lands an interview for her dream job.
I'm Going to Miss This: When Mitchell struggles to let go of his old life, Gloria helps him say goodbye. And Haley, Luke and Alex decide to throw a party at the Dunphy house.
Brand new series: MAFS Australia is back with a fresh batch of Aussie singles ready to wed sight unseen, starting with a jaw-dropping moment at the altar.
In Póvoa de Varzim in Portugal, some fabulous new arrivals join the group and our stars cook up a storm. But at the vote, one celeb doesn't take criticism well...
Please Homer Don't Hammer 'Em: Marge discovers that she has a gift for carpentry, but has to use Homer as a cover in order to overcome prejudices against women builders.
Treehouse of Horror XVII: Homer ingests a blob from an asteroid; Bart enslaves a clay monster; and everyone thinks that aliens are invading.
Theresa pushes Mercedes to give Warren another chance. A phone call makes Dillon concerned about Lucas's wellbeing.
...Australia - Brand new series: The weddings erupt into chaos when one groom forgets the rings, while bride Gia frets that a big secret could send her groom Scott running...
Computer programmer Andrew has been single for 10 years. Will he click with old-fashioned romantic Sarah? And Kenny and his biceps 'James' and 'Andrew' return to the restaurant.
Can Jayden hide his Don Juan ways from Isabel? Will estate agent John give Sarah, who's deaf, the butterflies in the stomach she's hoping for?
A celebration of Naked Attraction's very best naughty bits, revisiting some bad romances, from arguments to cringeworthy moments, including Cathy and Andy's explosive reunion.
